calibrations.note: Inferno hits 2-3× variável (5 casts: 2,2,2,3,2 → avg 2.2). Per-hit baseline 11167, buffed 16746 (ratio 1.500 confirma ×1.5 do Nasty Plot). Avg per cast: 2.2 × 11167 + 10 × 350 burn = 28067.

name: Shiny Ninetales
config: lvl 600, +70, XA8, Volcanic (+28% fire), sem device, neutro
observacao: Inferno 2-3 hit variável (avg ~2.2) + burn DoT; Fire Blast 1-hit + burn DoT; Flamethrower 1-hit + burn DoT; Flame Wheel 8-hit sem burn (per-hit ~5898, 5.4× mais que Ninetales); Fire Ball 1-hit + burn DoT

calibrations.config: lvl 600, +70, XA8, Volcanic, sem device, neutro (5 samples 2026-04-25)
calibrations.note: Inferno 2-3 hit variável (5 casts: 3,2,3,3,2 → avg 2.5). Per-hit ~17817 (range 17850-18006). Power = 2.5 × 17817 + 10 × 350 = 48042. Per-hit Shiny vs Ninetales: 17817 vs 11167 = 1.6× mais forte.
